param.name: LIGHTS_ON
param.documentation: Controls the arm LEDs (relay) and status LED. When set to flashing, the arm LED flash duration scales with distance from home (1ms at home, up to 125ms at 124m or beyond) when armed.

values.value: All LEDs off (status LED off, arm LEDs off)
Status LED on, arm LEDs off
Status LED on, arm LEDs flashing
